$comment: Canonical Alpha Campaign 2 research gate (Research Law + Physics Law). Single source of truth for whether new strategy search may begin. Supersedes the prose Research Gate in ../EXECUTION_REALITY_ENGINE_ASSESSMENT.md and execution-reality-engine/SPEC-06. A precondition is 'met' ONLY with cited evidence; UNKNOWN/unmet blocks the campaign. No precondition may be marked met by assumption.
rule: Alpha Campaign 2 opens only when every precondition.state == 'met' with evidence.

preconditions.statement: Observation is trustworthy — evidence bundles verified end-to-end (integrity + schema + rules).
preconditions.reason: No evidence bundles have been produced; bridge not instantiated.
preconditions.collapses_when: First verified bundles flow across the Secure Evidence Bridge (ARCH-02/06).

preconditions.statement: Scientific instruments (collectors, scheduler, store) are healthy by capability output, not uptime.
preconditions.reason: All Windows capabilities status=unknown until observed (contracts/windows-capabilities.json).
preconditions.collapses_when: Capability contracts verified healthy with output evidence.

preconditions.statement: Data collection is continuous — no undetected staleness during sessions.
preconditions.collapses_when: Collector produces fresh output across multiple sessions and freshness_detector confirms.

preconditions.statement: Execution reality is measured — spread/slippage/latency/fills observed, not estimated (Execution Law).
preconditions.reason: All 10 execution parameters UNKNOWN; zero observations (EXECUTION_REALITY_ENGINE_ASSESSMENT.md).
preconditions.collapses_when: Parameters promoted UNKNOWN->measured with confidence intervals (SPEC-06).

preconditions.statement: Economic feasibility established — the market is shown to PERMIT alpha net of measured costs (Physics Law).
preconditions.reason: Feasibility Map cannot be updated with observed execution because execution is unmeasured (depends on P4).
preconditions.collapses_when: Feasibility Map recomputed from measured net execution costs shows a non-empty viable region.

binding_constraint: Windows READ access not yet granted (environment boundary). Every precondition is downstream of it.
note: Physics Law: never optimize inside an economically impossible region. Until P5 is met, strategy search is not merely premature — it may be searching a region the market forbids.
